name: auto_facebook
description: Facebook joined-groups scraper -> Postgres warehouse (MISA-pattern: noVNC login + XHR discover + GraphQL replay)

scripts.db:migrate: PGPASSWORD=$(grep ^PG_PASSWORD .env | cut -d= -f2) psql -h $(grep ^PG_HOST .env | cut -d= -f2) -p $(grep ^PG_PORT .env | cut -d= -f2) -U $(grep ^PG_USER .env | cut -d= -f2) -d $(grep ^PG_DATABASE .env | cut -d= -f2) -v ON_ERROR_STOP=1
